headline: Has CAT Stock Run Ahead Of Its Valuation?
summary: The defining feature of Caterpillar's (CAT) Q1 2026 performance is the decoupling of its valuation from the traditional heavy machinery cycle. At the April 30 close price of $890 and a forward earnings estimate of $23.43, the stock is trading at 38 times earnings. This multiple indicates that the market has transitioned from viewing Caterpillar as a cyclical industrial to a structural play on the AI data center buildout. headline: Deere & Company Board Elects Brent Norwood as Chief Financial Officer
summary: Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) announced today that its Board of Directors has elected Brent Norwood, 44, as senior vice president and chief financial officer, effective May 1. Norwood's appointment follows an internal and external search and a rigorous vetting process.
